turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I just got laid off from my job. I feel so lost and unsure of what to do next.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: I'm really sorry to hear that. Losing a job can be really tough. It's completely normal to feel overwhelmed right now.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yeah, it feels like everything is just falling apart. I don't even know where to start with finding another job.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: It's okay to take some time to process your feelings first. Have you thought about reaching out to a career counselor or attending a job fair?
